inputs.label: Total Items (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of distinct items available for arrangement.

inputs.label: Items to Arrange (r)
inputs.businessContext: Number of items selected and arranged in a specific order.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result (use 0 for exact integer).

inputs.label: Maximum Result Cap
inputs.businessContext: Upper limit for the result to prevent computational overflow; if exceeded, an error is indicated.

primary.expression: function(n, r, decimalPlaces, maxResultCap) { if (n < 0 || r < 0 || r > n || !Number.isInteger(n) || !Number.isInteger(r)) return NaN; let result = 1; for (let i = n; i > n - r; i--) { result *= i; if (result > maxResultCap) return NaN; } return +result.toFixed(decimalPlaces); }

breakdown.expression: function(n) { if (n < 0 || !Number.isInteger(n)) return NaN; let fact = 1; for (let i = 2; i <= n; i++) fact *= i; return fact; }
function(n, r) { let m = n - r; if (m < 0 || !Number.isInteger(m)) return NaN; let fact = 1; for (let i = 2; i <= m; i++) fact *= i; return fact; }

primary.label: Permutations (nPr)
primary.description: The total number of ways to arrange r items from a set of n distinct items.
